title: Ordinance Retitling the Various Vacant Positions in the Existing Plantilla of Personnel in the Munuicipal Government of Los Baños in Accordance with Dbm Local Budget Circular No. 137 Dated July 13, 2021 ( INDEX OF OCCUPATIONAL SERVICES, POSITION TITLES AND SALARY GRADES IN THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT IOS-LGU), Cy 2021 Edition) and in Compliance with Section 325 of the Local Government Code of 1991, Civil Service Commision Memorandum Circular No. 14, S, 2018 and Dbm Budget Circular No. 2018-3.
